ref: with his beautiful wife Rebekah. He was afraid that someone might kill him to get her, and so he told everyone that Rebekah was his sister.

ref: Isaac answered, “Your brother tricked me and stole your blessing.”

ref: In fact, the Philistines were jealous of the large number of sheep, goats, and slaves that Isaac owned,
text: Onyaa nguankuw, anantwikuw, fifo kɛsenara: na Filistiafo hɔn enyi beer no.
translated: He who kills bulls and rams, and great bulls: the Philistines are coming to you.

ref: But life is in the blood, and you must not eat any meat that still has blood in it.

ref: When Jacob saw them, he said, “This is God's camp.” So he named the place Mahanaim.
text: Na Jakob hun hɔn no ɔsee dɛ, Nyankopɔn no dɔm nye yi: na ɔfrɛɛ bea no ne dzin Mahanaim.
translated: Jacob said, “This is the camp of God”; so he named the place Mahanaim.

ref: So God created humans to be like himself; he made men and women.
text: Na Nyankopɔn bɔɔ nyimpa wɔ nankasa no su do, Nyew, Nyankopɔn no su do na ɔbɔɔ nyimpa; ɔbɔɔ hɔn ɔbanyin nye ɔbaa.
translated: And God created man in His own image, in the image of God He created him; He created them male and female.

ref: He was sorry that he had made them,
text: EWURADZE nuu noho dɛ ɔyɛɛ nyimpa wɔ asaase do, na ɔyɛɛ no yaw wɔ n’akoma mu.
translated: God saw that people were very wicked on earth, and it grieved Him in His heart.

ref: I will keep my solemn promise to you and give you more descendants than can be counted.”
text: Na mebɛma m’ahyɛmu ada emi nye ɔwo ntamu, na mebɛma adɔr mbordo.
translated: And I will let my body lie down in your hands, and I will let love overflow.

ref: “I'm really lucky,” Leah said, and she named the boy Gad.

ref: Then your families can marry into ours, and ours can marry into yours, and we can live together like one nation.
text: yɛdze hɛn mbabaa bɛma hom, na hɛn so yɛafa hom mbabaa, na yɛnye hom atsena, na yɛayɛ ɔman kor.
translated: We will take our daughters and give them to them, and we will take their daughters for ourselves, and we will live with them, and we will become one nation.

ref: Jacob said to Laban, “The time is up, and I want to marry Rachel now!”
text: Na Jakob see Laban dɛ, Fa me yer ma me, na me nda aso, ma monkɔ ne nkyɛn.
translated: When Jacob saw Laban, he said, "Send me away so I may go to my own place."

ref: Seven days later Noah sent the dove out again.

ref: Isaac replied, “I am old and might die at any time.

translated: and he turned his back and looked, and behold, three boys were standing at his heels. And the moment he saw them, he quickly took off from his right side to meet them on the path, and he knelt down.
